input.description: Get updated wave plan after Wave 1 completion

text:
---

## Wave 1 Complete — Updated Status

**3 of 5 features released.** The remaining 2 both require worktrees and need to be run manually:

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `beat-tool` | **released** | review + audit + QA passed |
| `dev-driver-agentic-dispatch` | **released** | lock-file subsystem removed, dispatch endpoint added |
| `tool-streaming-async` | **released** | streaming SSE end-to-end wired in frontend |
| `tool-agent-invocation` | in_progress (impl) | **needs worktree** — `implement_task` |
| `tool-state-primitives` | in_progress (qa) | **needs worktree** — `run_qa` |

The remaining features need worktrees. To continue:

```
/sdlc-run tool-agent-invocation   # in a new worktree
/sdlc-run tool-state-primitives   # in a new worktree
```
